title: Magex's Terracotta Bricks
description: This resource pack changes the glazed terracotta into terracotta bricks!
body:
If you **enjoy** this resource pack, consider supporting me on [buymeacoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magex_ya)!

![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82dfb5be4a6c19c6a9b61497999399a116d261cb.png)

# About
**Magex's Terracotta Bricks**, is a resource pack that changes the **glazed terracotta** into new and amazing **terracotta bricks**, with new colourful textures and **NO diagonal turning** like all the other brick blocks!

![bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd4aa8d1ca80308d5dc17c3b4424c9cdea14e228.png)



# Features
- Changes the texture of all glazed terracotta
- Changes the name of all glazed terracotta
- Changes the model and blockstate of all glazed terracotta to remove its turning
